notices.author: PaperStream Admin
notices.message:
All students are informed that the examination forms for the May/June 2026 semester exams must be submitted before 20 May 2026.

Students who have not yet filled or submitted their exam forms are requested to complete the process as soon as possible to avoid any issues in appearing for the examination.

Last Date: 20 May 2026

— Government Polytechnic College, Jabalpur
notices.title: Exam Form
